Three-Lens Framework
Framework Risks Mitigations Assess Resources Download XLSX

Downloads

Assessment Workbook

Excel (.xlsx) — 9 sheets: Tutorial, 3 Scoring tabs, Action Plan, Inventory, Risk Reference, Mitigation Reference, History tracker

Download .xlsx

Risk Register

CSV — All 87 risks with IDs, tiers, categories, descriptions, and primary/secondary mitigations

Download .csv

Executive Briefing

PowerPoint (.pptx) — 5 slides: Incidents, Three Lenses, 15 Critical Risks, Cost of Inaction, First Five

Download .pptx

Practitioner Card

PowerPoint (.pptx) — Single printable slide with First Five, Phase 2, tier triage, scoring scale

Download .pptx

All files are also available in the GitHub repository.

Three-Lens Framework

An AI agent risk assessment framework for enterprise deployments. 87 risks across 11 categories. Grounded in 1,366 real-world incidents.

Based On

Man, J. (2022). Towards the Future of Work: Managing the Risks of AI and Automation. MIT Sloan School of Management.

Extended with MIT AIRI, OWASP LLM & Agentic Top 10, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001, and 27+ academic publications.

Quick Links

Framework Overview Risk Taxonomy Start Assessment Downloads Resources & Case Studies

One lens isn't enough.
